title: pilosella velutina
intro: Pilosella velutina, also known as Mouse-ear Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family, known for its woolly leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to have medicinal value in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pilosella velutina include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Pilosella velutina can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used both internally and externally to harness its medicinal properties.
